CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 10,2002
Off Calendar Dec-10-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this date. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Witness, Lilly Denice Henderson was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification: 1) Check Register Printouts; 2) 3 Invoices - monthly service fee. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $171,187.50; Costs: $331.00; Interest: $51,432.82 for a total judgment of $222,951.32. Order signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing In Scd 218 On Oct.28,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Oct-28-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. All parties present. Tom Prountzos, Esq. representing plaintiff.Witness Denice' Henderson, agent for McKesson Corp.,was sworn and examined. Matter was taken off-calendar as plaintiff asked for a continuance and wanted to re-serve and change some monetary numbers.
